title: Crispy Broccoli Puff Bites
description: A delicious and crunchy snack made with crispy puff pastry, steamed broccoli, and a hint of Chinese seasoning.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the puff pastry into small squares.
Place a small spoonful of steamed broccoli onto one half of each square.
Sprinkle a pinch of Chinese Five-Spice and salt over the broccoli.
Fold the other half of the pastry square over the filling to form a triangle.
Press the edges to seal and use a fork to crimp.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with pepper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
